name: Workato
description: Monitor Workato enterprise integration platform for automation access and workflow security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Workato at https://app.workato.com
2. Go to Account Settings → API Token
3. Copy your API token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Workato Account Settings → API token

checks.name: Employee Access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Workato integration automation platform is operational
